rows.tonnage_band: Vessels up to and including 30 metres in length overall
rows.unit: ZAR per metre or part thereof

rows.tonnage_band: Vessels over 30 metres up to 50 metres in length overall
rows.notes: Plus 208.23 per metre or part thereof over 30 metres

rows.tonnage_band: Vessels over 50 metres up to 70 metres in length overall
rows.notes: Plus 277.62 per metre or part thereof over 50 metres

general_conditions: Pilotage exemption certificates are valid per financial year. Licenses may be endorsed to cover all vessels of the same company if licenced and within the category covered. Fees adjusted for larger vessels. Cannot be applied to vessels without an exemption license.
